security_policies: Use role-based access control (RBAC) and enforce least privilege for all serverless functions.
All production secrets must be stored in a managed secrets vault; no secrets in code or environment files.
Encrypt data in transit (TLS 1.2+) and at rest using AES-256 or equivalent.
Enable comprehensive request/response logging with redaction of PII and secrets.
Verify webhook signatures for all inbound webhook endpoints using shared secrets or public key signatures.
Use idempotency keys for all payment-related requests and retries.
Enable multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all dashboard and CI/CD access.
operational_policies: Maintain a tested rollback plan for every production deployment.
Perform nightly backups of critical state and configuration; validate restores weekly.
All changes must be peer reviewed and pass automated tests before merge.
Incident response must be initiated within 15 minutes of critical alert; document postmortems within 48 hours.
Infrastructure changes require change tickets with approved risk assessment.
Production observability must include metrics, logs, and traces with 90-day retention.
Payment webhooks must be monitored for delivery failures and signature mismatches.
